title: Fermented Bean Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious stir fry made with fermented beans and saudic as the main ingredients.

ingredients.name: Fermented Beans
ingredients.notes: Available at most health food stores

ingredients.name: Saudic
ingredients.notes: Available at most health food stores

instructions: Heat the bean oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and saute for 1 minute.
Add the fermented beans and saudic, stir-frying for 2-3 minutes.
Add the soy sauce and salt to taste, stir-frying for an additional minute.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Optional: add additional stir-fry ingredients such as vegetables or tofu.
